description: Engagement (shiddukhin) contract. Location: Fustat. Dated: Wednesday, 9 Kislev 1473 Seleucid, which is 29 November 1161 CE, under the authority of the Gaʾon Netanʾel b. Moshe ha-Levi. Groom: the teacher Shemuel b. Yosef. Bride: Sitt al-Baqāʾ bt. Yefet. Marriage payments: 10 + 20 = 30 dinars (the 10 dinars will be paid at the time of the wedding, 'dukhūl'). The bride’s representative (wakīl) is Abū Yaʿqūb b. Avraham Ibn Abū l-Zakkār, the paternal uncle of her mother. She will live with the groom’s mother and brother in one domicile (maskan) as long as this does her no harm. At the engagement, one ring of silver and of gold was handed over to the representative. Signed by Avraham b. Elʿazar and Avraham b. Yaḥyā ha-Levi. The validation (qiyyum) is written in the margin at 90 degrees and it is signed by Menaḥem b. Berakhot and Mevorakh b. Natan he-Ḥaver. (Information in part from Goitein’s index cards.) EMS
description_he: הסכם שידוכין, פוסטאט, 9 כסלו 1473 לשטרות = 29 נובמבר 1161, בסמכות הגאון נתנאל בן משה הלוי: חתן: המלמד שמואל בן יוסף. כלה: סיתת-אל-בקאא בת יפת. מוהר: 10+20=30 דינר. תגור עם אם החתן ואחיו.
